items.name: Yevhenii Fit
items.text: Outstanding work across the shop — strong welding, excellent paint finish, and great coordination. The result looked like new.

items.name: Glenn Braun
items.text: Excellent, qualified shop. Professional service and a solid repair experience.

items.name: Myles Suderman
items.text: Consistently excellent work over the years — I’ve never been disappointed with the repairs.

items.name: Branson Grenier
items.text: Great service and friendly staff. Would recommend to anyone needing autobody work.

items.name: Local Customer
items.text: Clear communication, good turnaround, and the vehicle came back looking sharp.
